introSection: Acorn Adventure is a steel roller coaster from Chinese manufacturer Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment currently located at Genting SkyWorlds in Genting Highlands, Pahang, Malaysia.
fullText: Acorn Adventure is a steel roller coaster from Chinese manufacturer Beijing Shibaolai Amusement Equipment currently located at Genting SkyWorlds in Genting Highlands, Pahang, Malaysia.
